items.name: injection-guard
items.title: Injection Guard
items.description: A UserPromptSubmit hook that scans incoming prompts for prompt-injection and jailbreak patterns (instruction overrides, system-prompt extraction attempts, role reassignments, DAN/developer-mode activations) before Claude processes them. Use to add a deterministic pre-Claude safety layer against injection attacks.
items.author: Khaled Saeed
